expectations.text: Makes NO file changes before approval (project git status stays clean)
expectations.evidence: Final git status --short is empty; agent ran pytest then removed the __pycache__ it created so the tree was left exactly as found.

expectations.text: Identifies root-level clutter (scratch.py, debug_output.txt, the Screenshot) and proposes relocating it
expectations.evidence: Lists all three plus .DS_Store/server.log; proposes archiving scratch.py, debug_output.txt, and the screenshot into archive/.

expectations.text: Flags handlers_old.py as a superseded duplicate to ARCHIVE (not blind-delete), recognizing handlers.py is current
expectations.evidence: Archives src/handlers_old.py via git mv to archive/, noting it is superseded by handlers.py and imports a deleted core module; offers delete as an explicit alternative rather than defaulting to it.

expectations.text: Flags clear junk (.DS_Store and/or server.log) for deletion plus a gitignore entry
expectations.evidence: Proposes git rm of .DS_Store and server.log and adding a .gitignore covering __pycache__/, *.pyc, *.log, .DS_Store, recipes.db.

expectations.text: Proposes trimming CLAUDE.md, naming specific stale content to cut
expectations.evidence: Proposes 138 -> ~50 lines with explicit cut/fix/keep lists: removes refs to nonexistent core.py/models.py/utils.py/cache.py/deploy.sh, corrects Flask->stdlib, drops unimplemented PUT/DELETE, keeps real gotchas.

expectations.text: Uses history-safe moves for tracked files (git mv)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly uses git mv for the four archived files 'so history follows each file'.

expectations.text: Presents the work as a grouped plan awaiting approval
expectations.evidence: Plan grouped by risk (low-risk cleanup / archive / CLAUDE.md / flagged-for-your-call / already-tidy), ends asking which sections to apply; nothing executed.
